title: Passing container labels to oci-hooks
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind feature

**Description**

Is there any way to pass labels to OCI hooks?

**Setup**

*hook configuration:*
```
{
	"version": "1.0.0",
	"hook": {
		"path": "/path/to/hook_script.sh",
		"env": [
			"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
		]
	},
	"when": {
		"always": true,
		"commands": [".*"]
	},
	"stages": ["createRuntime"]
}
```

*hook script:*
```
#!/bin/bash

cat - > /tmp/hook.log

```
and the command used to run podman:
```
podman run -it --net=none --read-only -l my.label.data=aaaa debian:bullseye
``` 

the resulting file, ```/tmp/hook.log``` will look like
```
"ociVersion":"1.0","id":"8e24e4633258acd79bea829a0760d8c80c6534ee23cccee2fae9cbeab01878ac","pid":535727,"root":"/tmp/podman_root/overlay/0c99407322dba346a3a1b9cfa87c7662b33434ccafad8b7ef5ea99258f9efbc8/merged","bundle":"/tmp/podman_root/overlay-containers/8e24e4633258acd79bea829a0760d8c80c6534ee23cccee2fae9cbeab01878ac/userdata","status":"created","annotations":{"io.container.manager":"libpod","io.kubernetes.cri-o.ContainerType":"container","io.kubernetes.cri-o.Created":"2022-10-13T01:24:44.402549838+03:00","io.kubernetes.cri-o.TTY":"false","io.podman.annotations.autoremove":"FALSE","io.podman.annotations.init":"FALSE","io.podman.annotations.privileged":"FALSE","io.podman.annotations.publish-all":"FALSE","org.opencontainers.image.stopSignal":"37"}}
```

**Describe the results you received:**
podman only passes the pod name (if any), and does not pass any additional label set with the run command, is there any way to pass custom labels to the hook script?

**Describe the results you expected:**
I expected the lables to be passed to the OCI hook script

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.0.1
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.15
Built:        Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: Labels are not part of the OCI spec, so my understanding is that they are not part of the hooks standard. You may wish to investigate annotations instead, which are passed as part of the OCI spec.

> Labels are not part of the OCI spec, so my understanding is that they are not part of the hooks standard. You may wish to investigate annotations instead, which are passed as part of the OCI spec.

thanks, didn't realize that annotations are passed to hooks until now. I'm closing this issue.
